description: A tiny original Codex digital pet: an auburn-haired chibi scientist girl in a red turtleneck and white lab coat.
A tiny human chibi Codex pet based on Anya's recognizable pink-haired girl look.
A compact chibi pixel-art digital pet based on Kamisato Ayaka as a human character.
A tiny chibi pixel pet based on Feng Baobao from Under One Person, kept as a human character rather than an animal.
A compact human chibi Codex pet based on Ch’en from Arknights, preserving her own human operator identity.
A tiny human boy detective pet based on Conan's own recognizable look, not transformed into an animal.
A tiny chibi digital pet based on Furina from Genshin Impact, kept as a human character rather than an animal.
A chibi Codex digital pet version of Ganyu herself.
A tiny chibi human Hu Tao digital pet for Codex, faithful to her recognizable Genshin Impact appearance and not animalized.
A chibi pixel-art digital pet inspired by Kaito Kid as himself, in a white suit, cape, top hat, monocle, and confident magician-thief pose.
A small chibi pixel-pet version of Klee from Genshin Impact, kept as Klee herself.
A compact chibi Codex pet based on Lappland from Arknights, preserving her humanoid white-haired Lupo swordswoman identity.
A tiny chibi digital-pet version of March 7th from Honkai Star Rail, kept as herself rather than transformed into an animal.
A compact Codex digital pet based on Exusiai the New Covenant from Arknights, kept as her own chibi human/Sankta form.
A tiny human Phoebe pet inspired by Wuthering Waves: blonde acolyte girl with purple eyes, wide hat, blue-white cleric outfit, blue cape, and a simplified rectifier staff.
A chibi pixel-art Codex pet based on Raiden Shogun, preserving her human character identity.
A tiny human chibi Codex pet based on Regulus / 星锑 from Reverse: 1999, preserving her white aviator cap, dark sunglasses, red-orange jacket, blue outfit, and radio-DJ arcanist identity.
A tiny Codex digital pet version of Crayon Shin-chan as himself, not transformed into an animal.
A tiny Codex digital pet inspired by Sonetto from Reverse: 1999, kept as a human chibi character rather than an animal.
A compact Codex digital pet version of Vertin from Reverse: 1999, as her own human Timekeeper form.
A chibi human digital pet inspired by Yoimiya from Genshin Impact, preserving her recognizable fireworks-maker appearance.
A chibi human digital pet inspired by Zani from Wuthering Waves, preserving her white hair, dark horns, red eyes, business shirt, red tie, black harness, gloves, and black pants.
